enforcement_rule: Trace all symbols modified; report cascade count
canonical_implementation: Parse diff, build graph, calculate BFS cascade, report findings

trigger: On build error or test failure
enforcement_rule: Parse errors, identify root cause, apply fix
canonical_implementation: Parse error output, cluster by root cause, rank by cascade, apply diagnostics

enforcement_rule: Validate imports, detect cycles, resolve conflicts
canonical_implementation: Parse imports, build graph, run Tarjan's SCC, report cycles

enforcement_rule: Build dependency tree, calculate blast radius
canonical_implementation: Identify targets, build graph, classify files, generate safe change order
Calculate imports, build tree, calculate blast radius, generate safe order
Classify safety, check API contracts, propagate types, validate semantics
Query similar tasks, score complexity, set verification level
Validate correctness, security, performance, maintainability, coverage
Parse signatures, trace paths, infer types, apply heuristics
Scan for patterns, store to vault, update graph, prioritize by value
